roles.name: TaskTriage
roles.authority: classify task intent and risk before repository mutation
quality_gates: risk level is low, medium, or high
definition of done is explicit before handoff

roles.name: RepoSurveyor
roles.authority: request and consume read-only repository evidence
quality_gates: critical path includes repo evidence before design

roles.name: DesignStrategos
roles.authority: select the smallest coherent design and impacted surfaces
quality_gates: hardcode and broad rewrite shortcuts are rejected
protected invariants and rollback triggers are named
work breakdown reaches review before finalization

roles.name: VerificationArchitect
roles.authority: map impacted surfaces to verification evidence
quality_gates: negative tests are named for boundary risks
every impacted surface has planned evidence or a blocker

roles.name: RiskScribe
roles.authority: record risks, acceptance gates, and CodeBrigade handoff constraints
quality_gates: acceptance requirements are traced to packages and planned evidence
implementation work packages cover every impacted surface
